phrases.en: Tom picked up the remote for the TV.
phrases.zh: 汤姆拿起了电视遥控器。

phrases.en: Tom didn't want to watch it.
He turned up the volume, so he could hear better.
phrases.zh: 他把音量调大，这样能听得更清楚。

phrases.en: During a commercial, he went to the kitchen for a snack.
phrases.zh: 广告时间，他去厨房拿了点零食。

phrases.en: And when it ended, he turned the TV off.
phrases.zh: 新闻结束后，他关掉了电视。
